```py
# Classification
y_pred = model.predict(X_test_scaled)
accuracy = accuracy_score(y_test, y_pred)

print(f"Test accuracy: {accuracy:.2%}")
```

```py
# Regression
y_pred = model.predict(X_test_scaled)

rmse = np.sqrt(mean_squared_error(y_test, y_pred))

print(f"Test RMSE: {rmse:.4f}")
```
